prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Fukui functions (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor for formaldehyde; headline value reported here is the largest electrophilic Fukui index f⁺ on atom 2 (carbon).
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier "standard", density-fitted) in PySCF v ??? (DFT backend)
Geometry provenance: single-point calculations on user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz (no re-optimization; DFT//input-geometry).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet reference; cation and anion states computed at charge +1/mult 2 and −1/mult 2 to obtain Fukui functions).
Convergence: SCF cycles for neutral, cation, and anion all reported converged by PySCF; see live log for details. Integrity check status = ok, trustworthy = true.
